title: Atomic Structure: The Quantum Foundation of Chemistry
description: Explore the quantum mechanical description of atoms, from electron orbitals to quantum numbers. Understand how atomic structure forms the basis for all chemical behavior and quantum chemistry simulations.
learningObjectives: Describe the quantum mechanical model of the atom and its historical development
Explain the four quantum numbers and their physical significance
Identify atomic orbital shapes and their mathematical descriptions
Apply the aufbau principle, Pauli exclusion principle, and Hund's rule
Connect atomic structure to the periodic table organization
Recognize why quantum computers excel at simulating atomic systems
